constraints: Used only `nix develop -c ...` for compiler/test commands
Used dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR under the assigned mission evidence directory
Did not start servers or use ports

notes: No validation-contract assertion IDs were assigned for this milestone because the implementation feature has no fulfills mapping.
This report records the requested real CLI/compiler surface checks as custom flow assertions.

assertions.title: Generic param to concrete mismatch is rejected (focused negative test 28)

steps.action: Inspect `test/test_typecheck.ml` for the negative fixture and list numbering
steps.expected: Negative test 28 is `generic param to concrete rejected` backed by `invalid_generic_param_to_concrete` expecting a `type mismatch`
steps.observed: `invalid_generic_param_to_concrete` is defined and registered as negative test 28 with `fail ~expect:"type mismatch"`.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29` with the dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR
steps.expected: Negative test 28 passes by rejecting the bad generic-to-concrete call
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and reported `[OK] negative 28 generic param to concrete rejected`.

evidence.command: export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=.../cli-generic-soundness-round2/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29

assertions.title: Cross-parameter generic return mismatch is rejected (focused negative test 29)

steps.action: Inspect `test/test_typecheck.ml` for the negative fixture and list numbering
steps.expected: Negative test 29 is `generic cross-param return rejected` backed by `invalid_generic_param_cross_return` expecting a `type mismatch`
steps.observed: `invalid_generic_param_cross_return` is defined and registered as negative test 29 with `fail ~expect:"type mismatch"`.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29` with the dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR
steps.expected: Negative test 29 passes by rejecting the cross-parameter return mismatch
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and reported `[OK] negative 29 generic cross-param return rejected`.

evidence.command: export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=.../cli-generic-soundness-round2/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29

assertions.title: Preserved positive generic Self / constructor flows still pass (focused positive tests 22,23,31-35)

steps.action: Inspect `test/test_typecheck.ml` for the positive fixtures and list numbering
steps.expected: Positive tests 22, 23, and 31-35 cover preserved generic `Self` and constructor flows
steps.observed: The file registers 22 `generic Self substitution`, 23 `generic Self chained`, and 31-35 for constructor preservation cases.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test positive 22,23,31-35` with the dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR
steps.expected: All seven targeted positive tests pass
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and reported `[OK]` for positive tests 22, 23, 31, 32, 33, 34, and 35.

evidence.command: export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=.../cli-generic-soundness-round2/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test positive 22,23,31-35

assertions.title: Broader repo CLI test entrypoint still passes (`nix develop -c dune runtest`)

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe --` with the dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR
steps.expected: The full typecheck CLI executable passes all registered tests
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and the full typecheck executable reported `Test Successful` with 66 tests run.

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune runtest` with the dedicated DUNE_BUILD_DIR
steps.expected: The repository test entrypoint passes in the flake environment
steps.observed: Command exited 0. Execute-based validation succeeded, and terminal-session evidence captured successful `dune runtest` completion markers (`EXIT_CODE:0` and `ROUND2_RUNTEXIT:0`).

frictions.description: `tuistory` was not installed on the host at session start, so terminal-snapshot capture required a local user-level install via `bun add -g tuistory` before CLI evidence could be recorded.
frictions.resolution: Installed `tuistory@0.1.0` in the user Bun global directory, then reused one terminal session for all CLI snapshots.

frictions.description: The shell-redirected `dune-runtest.log` captured only the initial Nix-shell banner, while the detailed test stream was visible in the terminal session instead.
frictions.resolution: Kept the Execute exit code as the authoritative pass/fail signal and supplemented it with tuistory transcript/snapshot evidence including explicit completion markers.

summary: Ran the requested misc-followups-4 CLI soundness rerun on the real compiler surface. Focused negative tests 28 and 29 passed as rejections, focused positive tests 22,23,31-35 stayed green, the full typecheck executable passed 66 tests, and `nix develop -c dune runtest` exited 0 in the dedicated mission build directory.
